title: Author a paginated table with push_patch + cursor
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/users_table_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.UsersTableLive) that paginates a user table by cursor. mount/3 stream(:users, []). handle_params/3 reads %{"cursor" => cursor} (default nil), loads MyApp.Accounts.list_users(cursor: cursor), and streams with reset: true. "next" button calls push_patch(to: ~p"/users?cursor=#{next_cursor}"). Must stay in the same LiveView — do not use push_navigate.
tier_rationale: Push_patch vs push_navigate discrimination + stream + handle_params wiring in one LiveView.
